nodes.label: Mission Control — Local Web Cockpit (FastAPI, 127.0.0.1:8765)
nodes.rationale: Hermes-style local personal cockpit, deliberately NOT a hardened web app: localhost-only binding, optional token, two-tier execution model (whitelisted pipeline buttons for safety + full PTY terminals for power, arbitrary code execution accepted by design), read-only DB access, YAML editor as the single write path with backup.
